subcodes.first_line: After the remembrance and praise of the Beloved of all worlds, and salutations upon the exalted Prophets, it is submitted that for some time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از ذکر و ثنای محبوب عالمیان و درود بر انبیای عظام عرض میشود که مدتهاست
